revision.text:

kòe-sin]] [[zh_yue:Category:1027年死]] [[zh:Category:1027年逝世]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Abe no Yoshihira]].

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q6579829)
